text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Trainer! We have a problem!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking past the student dorms, when Grass
Wonder comes running toward me, looking
uncharacteristically flustered.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I... I can't find El anywhere. And I found this in our
room...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shows me the mask that is so dear to El
Condor Pasa—a mask she never leaves home
without.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: She would never go out without her mask on.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop thinking about it. If something
happened to her...
choice_data_list: Let's split up and look for her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder hands me the mask, and then we
split up and search for El high and low.
Eventually...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find a girl who looks strikingly familiar. I walk up
and stand beside her.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I've finally been exposed...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now you know... I'm a liar.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm... not the world's strongest racer. Not only
that...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I never really believed I was.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I let it show a little after I ran in the Derby with
Spe. Then, when I ran with Suzuka, that was it. My
lies unraveled.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer... look! This is my true face!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa's face... Where she once told me
to never look, she now commands I do...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm just a completely average Umamusume... No,
even worse...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm a weakling... a crybaby... a chicken. Without a
shred of confidence...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I thought if I just faked it... maybe I could be the
me that I wanted to be.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So I put on a mask and told myself that I was
strong.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But no one else is a phony like me. Not Spe, not
Suzuka... No one.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: They bare it all and fight as they really are! But I...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I can't even do that.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I just hide my weakness behind a mask and call
myself the world's strongest racer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
My papa gave me that mask. It's so important to
me, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It just proves I'm a liar! A walking ball of lies! I—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A ball of lies...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stare at the mask that Grass Wonder handed
me. With this mask...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
La victoria! I'm the best, the greatest, the one to
beat all the rest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Did you see me, Trainer?! I was soaring with all
my might!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The gallant hero! The raging storm! The
mysterious masked warrior—Aztec Condor comes
to the rescue!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa ran with all her might and brought
enjoyment to many.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if it was all just bravado, what she's
accomplished...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Everything you've accomplished is real, El.
Everything you've accomplished is real, El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But I—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I press the question. Masked wrestlers also hide
their true identities.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Are their moves all lies? Is their desire to
entertain others a lie?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: N-no way! My papa's no liar!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
He might be different at home than when he's in
the ring, but even so...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The papa in the ring is still real! He always wants
to put on the best match possible and make
everyone happy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems like she's realized it now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I see... Even if I hide my true self... Even if I hide
my weakness behind a mask...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's not a lie! The things I want to accomplish...
The races I want to show everyone... They're real!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Even if... I can't do them quite yet...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: My mask...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: If I put this on again, that means...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer... Can you put it on for me?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You can put it on yourself, El.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure how long she's been listening, but I
turn to see Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: You have to put it on yourself. Do you know why?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's because you're El Condor Pasa. You're the
Umamusume who's going to be the strongest
racer in the world.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You can rely on your trainer, of course, but in the
end, the one who spreads your wings has to be
you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Didn't you swear to be my top rival one day?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What kind of friend doesn't have the guts to even
fake it for the ones they care about?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa takes the mask in her hands. Her
grip tightens, wringing the mask.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I'm just a crybaby and a chicken.
But...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But if I keep that to myself, then I can be a
cheerful and optimistic racer who tears down the
turf faster than anyone!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm Grass's archrival! With unparalleled talent and
the best trainer ever...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Reintroducing the one... the only...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The piercing cry signalling the Phantom Bird's
revival echoes through the night.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Grass. Thank you, Trainer. I'm okay
now!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've just been... aiming a little too high. That's
all. ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But now I'm back, baby! Even if I fall, I just have
to kick off the ground and soar again!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now, what should my next race be?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
For starters, I need to take some time and focus
on training to become the best in the country!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
In addition, which race will all the top
competitors be competing in? Where will all my
dedicated fans be looking?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to take our time, then we should
aim for next year. A medium-distance race where
are all the top talents will be gathered.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fans always look forward to the fan-voted Grand
Prix races. Which means...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ooohhh, the Takarazuka Kinen! The undisputed
end-of-spring senior showdown!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Let's go for it! If I can beat everyone there, I'll
definitely be fit to take on the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once broken and defeated, El Condor Pasa has
risen again—just like a phoenix.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El can move forward now. And so can I.
